title: mesosphaerum goyazense
intro: Mesosphaerum goyazense, also known as Brazilian lemongrass or Brazilian verbena, is a plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains limonene, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Mesosphaerum goyazense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Mesosphaerum goyazense include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or ingested in moderation, under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
